docs.title: 介绍
docs.text:
并查集是一种管理元素所属集合的数据结构，其用一个森林实现，一棵树维护个集合

操作:

  • find(u): 查询元素 u 的所属集合
    • 复杂度 : $O(1)$
  • merge(u, v): 将元素 u, v 的所属集合合并
    • 复杂度 : $O(1)$

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
struct disjoint_set_union {
public:
    disjoint_set_union(int n)
    : f(n + 1), g(n + 1) {
        for (int i = 1; i <= n; ++i) f[i] = i, g[i] = 1;
    }
    auto find(int x) -> int {
        return x == f[x] ? x : f[x] = find(f[x]);
    }
    auto check(int x, int y) -> bool {
        return find(x) == find(y);
    }
    auto merge(int x, int y) -> void {
        if ((x = find(x)) == (y = find(y)))
            return;
        if (g[x] >= g[y])
            g[x] += g[y], f[y] = x;
        else    
            g[y] += g[x], f[x] = y;
    }
private:
    std::vector<int> f, g;
};

docs.title: 介绍
docs.text:
树状数组是一种维护序列前缀信息的数据结构，该信息需要满足结合律

  • 结合律: 设 $L$ 为左半部分信息，$R$ 为右半部分信息，那么需要满足 $L \ opt \ R = R \ opt \ L$

操作:

  • update(u, x): 将原序列的 u 位置依据 x 去更新
    • 复杂度: $O(logn)$
  • query(u, x): 以 x 为初始值查询原序列 $[1, u]$ 的前缀信息
    • 复杂度: $O(logn)$
  • find_first(x): 查询前缀信息 <= x 的最左位置
    • 复杂度: $O(logn)$

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
template <typename T> struct fenwick_tree {
public:
    #define lowbit(x) (x & -x)
    fenwick_tree(int _n)
    : n(_n), f(_n + 1) {}
    fenwick_tree(std::vector<T> Init)
    : fenwick_tree(Init.size() - 1) {
        for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
            f[i] += Init[i];
            if (i + lowbit(i) <= n) {
                f[i + lowbit(i)] += f[i];
            }
        }
    }
    auto update(int u, T x) -> void {
        for (; 1 <= u && u <= n; f[u] += x, u += lowbit(u));
    }
    auto query(int u, T x = T()) -> T {
        for (; u; x += f[u], u -= lowbit(u)); return x;
    }
    auto find_first(T x) -> int {
        int res = 0;
        for (int i = 1 << std::__lg(n); i; i >>= 1) {
            if ((res | i) <= n && f[res | i] < x)
                x -= f[res | i];
        }
        return res + 1;
    }
    #undef lowbit
private:
    int n;
    std::vector<T> f;
};

docs.title: 介绍
docs.text:
线段树是一种维护序列区间信息的数据结构，该信息需要满足结合律

  • 结合律: 设 $L$ 为左半部分信息，$R$ 为右半部分信息，那么需要满足 $L \ opt \ R = R \ opt \ L$

操作:

  • update(u, x): 将原序列的 u 位置依据 x 去更新
    • 复杂度: $O(logn)$
  • update(l, r, x) : 将原序列的 $[l, r]$ 区间依据 x 去更新
    • 复杂度: $O(logn)$
  • query(l, r): 查询原序列 $[l, r]$ 的区间信息
    • 复杂度: $O(logn)$
  • find_first(l, r, check): 找到原序列 $[L, R]$ 的第一个 check(true) 的位置
    • 复杂度: $O(logn)$
  • find_first(l, r, check): 找到原序列 $[L, R]$ 最后一个 check(true) 的位置
    • 复杂度: $O(logn)$

docs.title: 单点修改
docs.text:
template <typename Info> struct segment_tree {
public:
    #define lson (p << 1)
    #define rson (p << 1 | 1)
    segment_tree(int _n)
    : n(_n), f(4 << std::__lg(_n)) {}
    segment_tree(std::vector<Info> info)
    : segment_tree(info.size() - 1) {
        auto build = [&](auto &&self, int p, int l, int r) -> void {
            if (l == r) return (void)(f[p] = info[l]);
            int m = l + r >> 1;
            self(self, lson, l, m);
            self(self, rson, m + 1, r);
            push_up(p);
        };
        build(build, 1, 1, n);
    }
    auto push_up(int p) -> void {
        f[p] = f[lson] + f[rson];
    }
    auto update(int p, int l, int r, int u, Info x) -> void {
        if (u < l || r < u) return;
        if (l == r) return (void)(f[p] = x);
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        update(lson, l, m, u, x);
        update(rson, m + 1, r, u, x);
        push_up(p);
    }
    auto query(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R) -> Info {
        if (R <  l || r <  L) return Info();
        if (L <= l && r <= R) return f[p];
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        return query(lson, l, m, L, R) + query(rson, m + 1, r, L, R);
    }
    auto find_first(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, auto &check) -> int {
        if (R < l || r > L || !check(f[p])) return -1;
        if (l == r) return l;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        int res = find_first(lson, l, m, L, R, check);
        if (res == -1)
            return find_first(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, check);
        else
            return res;
    }
    auto find_last(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, auto &check) -> int {
        if (R < l || r > L || !check(f[p])) return -1;
        if (l == r) return l;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        int res = find_last(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, check);
        if (res == -1)
            return find_last(lson, l, m, L, R, check);
        else
            return res;
    }
    #undef lson
    #undef rson
private:
    int n;
    std::vector<Info> f;
};

template <typename Info, typename Lazy> struct segment_tree {
public:
    #define lson (p << 1)
    #define rson (p << 1 | 1)
    segment_tree(int _n)
    : n(_n), f(4 << std::__lg(_n)), g(4 << std::__lg(_n)) {}
    segment_tree(std::vector<Info> info)
    : segment_tree(info.size() - 1) {
        auto build = [&](auto &&self, int p, int l, int r) -> void {
            if (l == r) return (void)(f[p] = info[l]);
            int m = l + r >> 1;
            self(self, lson, l, m);
            self(self, rson, m + 1, r);
            push_up(p);
        };
        build(build, 1, 1, n);
    }
    auto push_up(int p) -> void {
        f[p] = f[lson] + f[rson];
    }
    auto push_down(int p) -> void {
        f[lson] += g[p], g[lson] += g[p];
        f[rson] += g[p], g[rson] += g[p];
        g[p] = Lazy();
    }
    auto update(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, Lazy x) -> void {
        if (R <  l || r <  L) return;
        if (L <= l && r <= R) return (void)(f[p] += x, g[p] += x);
        push_down(p);
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        update(lson, l, m, L, R, x);
        update(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, x);
        push_up(p);
    }
    auto query(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R) -> Info {
        if (R <  l || r <  L) return Info();
        if (L <= l && r <= R) return f[p];
        push_down(p);
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        return query(lson, l, m, L, R) + query(rson, m + 1, r, L, R);
    }
    auto find_first(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, auto &check) -> int {
        if (R < l || r > L || !check(f[p])) return -1;
        if (l == r) return l;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        int res = find_first(lson, l, m, L, R, check);
        if (res == -1)
            return find_first(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, check);
        else
            return res;
    }
    auto find_last(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, auto &check) -> int {
        if (R < l || r > L || !check(f[p])) return -1;
        if (l == r) return l;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        int res = find_last(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, check);
        if (res == -1)
            return find_last(lson, l, m, L, R, check);
        else
            return res;
    }
    #undef lson
    #undef rson
private:
    int n;
    std::vector<Info> f;
    std::vector<Lazy> g;
};

docs.title: 扫描线
docs.text:
std::vector<int> all = {-1};

struct info {
    int len, tag;
    info()
    : len(0), tag(0) {}
    info(int _len, int _tag)
    : len(_len), tag(_tag) {}
}

template <typename Info> struct segment_tree {
public:
    #define lson (p << 1)
    #define rson (p << 1 | 1)
    segment_tree(int _n)
    : n(_n), f(4 << std::__lg(_n)) {}
    auto push_up(int p, int l, int r) -> void {
        if (f[p].tag)
            f[p].len = all[r + 1] - all[l];
        else if (l != r)
            f[p].len = f[lson].len + f[rson].len;
        else
            f[p].len = 0;
    }
    auto update(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, int x) -> void {
        if (R <= all[l] || all[r + 1] <= L) return;
        if (L <= all[l] && all[r + 1] <= R) return (void)(f[p].tag += x, push_up(p, l, r));
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        update(lson, l, m, L, R, x);
        update(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, x);
        push_up(p, l, r);
    }
    auto query(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R) -> int {
        if (R <= all[l] || all[r + 1] <= L) return 0;
        if (L <= all[l] && all[r + 1] <= R) return f[p].len;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        return query(lson, l, m, L, R) + query(rson, m + 1, r, L, R);
    }
    #undef lson
    #undef rson
private:
    int n;
    std::vector<Info> f;
};

docs.title: 介绍
docs.text:
ST表是一种离线的维护区间信息的数据结构，该信息需要满足结合律

  • 结合律: 设 $L$ 为左半部分信息，$R$ 为右半部分信息，那么需要满足 $L \ opt \ R = R \ opt \ L$

操作:

  • query(l, r): 查询 $[l, r]$ 的信息
    • 复杂度: $O(1)$

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
template <typename T> struct sparse_table {
public:
    sparse_table(int _n)
    : n(_n), f(std::__lg(n) + 1, std::vector<T>(_n + 1)) {}
    sparse_table(std::vector<T> info, auto &check)
    : sparse_table(info.size() - 1) {
        f[0] = info;
        for (int k = 1; k <= std::__lg(n); ++k)
            for (int i = 1; i + (1 << k) - 1 <= n; ++i)
                f[k][i] = check(f[k - 1][i], f[k - 1][i + (1 << k - 1)]);
    }
    auto query(int l, int r, auto &check) -> T {
        int k = std::__lg(r - l + 1);
        return check(f[k][l], f[k][r - (1 << k) + 1]);
    }
private:
    int n;
    std::vector<std::vector<T>> f;
};

docs.title: 介绍
docs.text: 树上最近公共祖先是指，树上两点的简单路径中，同为他两祖先的点

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
template <typename Edge> struct lowest_common_ancestor {
public:
    lowest_common_ancestor(int n, int root, std::vector<std::vector<Edge>> &G)
    : dfn(n + 1), f(std::__lg(n) + 1, std::vector<int>(n + 1)) {
        int timer = 0;
        auto dfs = [&](auto &&self, int u, int p) -> void {
            dfn[u] = ++timer;
            f[0][timer] = p;

            for (auto &[v] : G[u]) {
                if (v == p) continue;
                self(self, v, u);
            }
        };
        dfs(dfs, root, 0);

        for (int k = 1; k <= std::__lg(n); ++k) {
            for (int i = 1; i + (1 << k) - 1 <= n; ++i) {
                f[k][i] = check(f[k - 1][i], f[k - 1][i + (1 << k - 1)]);
            }
        }
    }
    auto check(const int x, const int y) -> int {
        return dfn[x] < dfn[y] ? x : y;
    }
    auto query(int x, int y) -> int {
        if (x == y)
            return x;
        if (dfn[x] > dfn[y])
            std::swap(x, y);
        int k = std::__lg(y - x);
        return check(f[k][x + 1], f[k][y - (1 << k) + 1]);
    }
private:
    std::vector<int> dfn;
    std::vector<std::vector<int>> f;
};

docs.title: 介绍
docs.text: 割边是指去掉一条边之后，图中的连通分量增加，那么该边为割边

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
struct edge {
    int v, id;
    edge() : v(0), id(0) {}
    edge(int _v, int _id) : v(_v), id(_id) {}
};

auto tarjan_cut_edge(int n, int m, std::vector<std::vector<edge>> &G) -> std::vector<int> {
    static std::vector<int> dfn, low, cut;
    dfn.assign(n + 1, 0);
    low.assign(n + 1, 0);
    cut.assign(m * 2 + 2, 0);

    int timer = 0;
    auto tarjan = [&](auto &&self, int u, int pre_id) -> void {
        dfn[u] = low[u] = ++timer;

        for (auto &[v, id] : G[u]) {
            if (id == (pre_id ^ 1))
                continue;
            if (!dfn[v]) {
                self(self, v, id);
                low[u] = std::min(low[u], low[v]);
                if (low[v] > dfn[u])
                    cut[id] = cut[id ^ 1] = 1;
            } else {
                low[u] = std::min(low[u], dfn[v]);
            }
        }
    };

    for (int u = 1; u <= n; ++u) if (!dfn[u]) tarjan(tarjan, u, 0);

    return cut;
}

docs.title: 介绍
docs.text: 割边是指去掉一个点之后，图中的连通分量增加，那么该边为割点

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
struct edge {
    int v;
    edge() : v(0) {}
    edge(int _v) : v(_v) {}
};

auto tarjan_cut_node(int n, std::vector<std::vector<edge>> &G) -> std::vector<int> {
    static std::vector<int> dfn, low, cut;
    dfn.assign(n + 1, 0);
    low.assign(n + 1, 0);
    cut.assign(n + 1, 0);

    int timer = 0, root;
    auto tarjan = [&](auto &&self, int u) -> void {
        dfn[u] = low[u] = ++timer;

        int cnt = 0;
        for (auto &[v] : G[u]) {
            if (!dfn[v]) {
                ++cnt;
                self(self, v);
                low[u] = std::min(low[u], low[v]);
                if (low[v] >= dfn[u] && u != root)
                    cut[u] = 1;
            } else {
                low[u] = std::min(low[u], dfn[v]);
            }
        }

        if (cnt >= 2 && u == root) cut[u] = 1;
    };

    for (int u = 1; u <= n; ++u)
        if (!dfn[u]) tarjan(tarjan, root = u);

    return cut;
}

docs.title: 介绍
docs.text: 边双连通分量是指该连通分量里，去掉任意一条边都不会使得该连通分量不连通

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
struct edge {
    int v, id;
    edge() : v(0), id(0) {}
    edge(int _v, int _id) : v(_v), id(_id) {}
};

auto tarjan_ebcc(int n, std::vector<std::vector<edge>> &G) -> std::tuple<int, std::vector<int>, std::vector<std::vector<edge>>> {
    static std::vector<int> dfn, low, bcc;
    dfn.assign(n + 1, 0);
    low.assign(n + 1, 0);
    bcc.assign(n + 1, 0);

    int timer = 0, bcc_n = 0;
    auto tarjan = [&](auto &&self, int u, int pre_id) -> void {
        dfn[u] = low[u] = ++timer;

        static std::vector<int> stack;
        stack.push_back(u);

        for (auto &[v, id] : G[u]) {
            if (id == (pre_id ^ 1))
                continue;
            if (!dfn[v]) {
                self(self, v, id);
                low[u] = std::min(low[u], low[v]);
            } else if (!bcc[v]) {
                low[u] = std::min(low[u], dfn[v]);
            }
        }

        if (dfn[u] == low[u] && ++bcc_n) {
            while (!stack.empty()) {
                auto v = stack.back(); stack.pop_back();
                bcc[v] = bcc_n;
                if (v == u) break;
            }
        }
    };

    for (int u = 1; u <= n; ++u) if (!dfn[u]) tarjan(tarjan, u, 0);

    std::vector<std::vector<edge>> bcc_G(bcc_n + 1);
    for (int u = 1; u <= n; ++u) {
        for (auto &[v, id] : G[u]) {
            if (bcc[u] == bcc[v]) continue;
            bcc_G[bcc[u]].emplace_back(bcc[v], 0);
        }
    }

    return {bcc_n, bcc, bcc_G};
}

auto tarjan_scc(int n, std::vector<std::vector<edge>> &G) -> std::tuple<int, std::vector<int>, std::vector<std::vector<edge>>> {
    static std::vector<int> dfn, low, scc;
    dfn.assign(n + 1, 0);
    low.assign(n + 1, 0);
    scc.assign(n + 1, 0);

    int timer = 0, scc_n = 0;
    auto tarjan = [&](auto &&self, int u) -> void {
        dfn[u] = low[u] = ++timer;

        static std::vector<int> stack;
        stack.push_back(u);

        for (auto &[v] : G[u]) {
            if (!dfn[v]) {
                self(self, v);
                low[u] = std::min(low[u], low[v]);
            } else if (!scc[v]) {
                low[u] = std::min(low[u], dfn[v]);
            }
        }

        if (dfn[u] == low[u] && ++scc_n) {
            while (!stack.empty()) {
                auto v = stack.back(); stack.pop_back();
                scc[v] = scc_n;
                if (v == u) break;
            }
        }
    };

    for (int u = 1; u <= n; ++u) if (!dfn[u]) tarjan(tarjan, u);

    std::vector<std::vector<edge>> scc_G(scc_n + 1);
    for (int u = 1; u <= n; ++u) {
        for (auto &[v] : G[u]) {
            if (scc[u] == scc[v]) continue;
            scc_G[scc[u]].push_back(scc[v]);
        }
    }

    return {scc_n, scc, scc_G};
}

docs.text: 点双连通分量是指该连通分量里，去掉任意一个点都不会使得该连通分量不连通

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
struct edge {
    int v;
    edge() : v(0) {}
    edge(int _v) : v(_v) {}
};

auto tarjan_vbcc(int n, std::vector<std::vector<edge>> &G) -> std::tuple<int, std::vector<std::vector<int>>> {
    static std::vector<int> dfn, low;
    static std::vector<std::vector<int>> bcc;
    dfn.assign(n + 1, 0);
    low.assign(n + 1, 0);

    int timer = 0, bcc_n = 0;
    auto tarjan = [&](auto &&self, int u) -> void {
        dfn[u] = low[u] = ++timer;

        static std::vector<int> stack;
        if (G[u].empty() && ++bcc_n)
            return (void)(bcc.push_back(std::vector<int>(1, u)));
        else
            stack.push_back(u);

        for (auto &[v] : G[u]) {
            if (!dfn[v]) {
                self(self, v);
                low[u] = std::min(low[u], low[v]);
                if (low[v] >= dfn[u] && ++bcc_n) {
                    bcc.push_back(std::vector<int>());
                    while (!stack.empty()) {
                        auto p = stack.back(); stack.pop_back();
                        bcc[bcc_n - 1].push_back(p);
                        if (p == v) break;
                    }
                    bcc[bcc_n - 1].push_back(u);
                }
            } else {
                low[u] = std::min(low[u], dfn[v]);
            }
        }
    };

    for (int u = 1; u <= n; ++u)
        if (!dfn[u]) tarjan(tarjan, u);

    return {bcc_n, bcc};
}

auto binary_sqrt(uInt n) -> uInt {
    uInt x = 0, y;
    for (int i = 31; i >= 0; --i) {
        y = x | (1LL << i);

}

docs.title: 介绍
docs.text: 模数类是一种对值自动取模的类，在一类组合计数的题中不用担心自己哪里没有取模到位，十分方便

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
template <typename T>
constexpr auto quick_power(T a, uInt b, T res = T(1)) -> T {
    for (; b; a *= a, b >>= 1) if (b & 1) res *= a; return res;
}

template <Int P> struct mod_int {
public:
    static Int M;
    constexpr static Int get_mod() {
        return P ? P : M;
    }
    constexpr static void set_mod(Int _M) {
        M = _M;
    }
    constexpr mod_int(Int _x = 0)
    : x(check(_x % get_mod())) {}
    constexpr Int check(Int val) const {
        if (val < 0)
            val += get_mod();
        if (val >= get_mod())
            val -= get_mod();
        return val;
    }
    constexpr mod_int inv() const {
        return quick_power(*this, get_mod() - 2);
    }
    constexpr mod_int operator - () const {
        return mod_int(check(get_mod() - *this));
    }
    constexpr mod_int &operator += (mod_int other) & { this->x = check(this->x + other.x); return *this; }
    constexpr mod_int &operator -= (mod_int other) & { this->x = check(this->x - other.x); return *this; }
    constexpr mod_int &operator *= (mod_int other) & { this->x = check(this->x * other.x % get_mod()); return *this; }
    constexpr mod_int &operator /= (mod_int other) & { this->x = check(this->x * other.inv() % get_mod()); return *this; }
    friend constexpr mod_int operator + (mod_int l, mod_int r) { return l += r; }
    friend constexpr mod_int operator - (mod_int l, mod_int r) { return l -= r; }
    friend constexpr mod_int operator * (mod_int l, mod_int r) { return l *= r; }
    friend constexpr mod_int operator / (mod_int l, mod_int r) { return l /= r; }
    friend constexpr bool operator == (mod_int l, mod_int r) { return l.x == r.x; }
    friend constexpr bool operator != (mod_int l, mod_int r) { return l.x != r.x; }
    friend constexpr std::istream &operator >> (std::istream &is, mod_int &val) {
        return is >> val.x, val = mod_int(val.x), is;
    }
    friend constexpr std::ostream &operator << (std::ostream &os, const mod_int &val) {
        return os << val.x;
    }
private:
    Int x;
};

docs.text:
字符串哈希是使用两个数 $Base$ 和 $Mod$，将一个字符串序列的子串的值都映射到 $[0, Mod)$，虽然会有冲突概率，但也不失是字符串算法中的基础算法，以及解决相关问题的高效算法

操作:

  • query(l, r): 查询原字符串 $[l, r]$ 的哈希值
    • 复杂度: $O(1)$

docs.title: 模数哈希
docs.text:
template <uInt B, uInt P> struct string_hash_mInt {
public:
    string_hash_mInt(const std::string &s, const char offset = 'a')
    : n(s.size()), hash(s.size() + 1), base(s.size() + 1, 1) {
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            base[i + 1] = base[i] * B % P;
            hash[i + 1] = (hash[i] + (s[i] - offset) * base[i] % P) % P;
        }
    }
    auto query(int l, int r) -> uInt {
        return (hash[r] - hash[l - 1] + P) % P * base[n - l + 1] % P; 
    }
private:
    int n;
    std::vector<uInt> hash, base;
};

docs.title: 自然溢出哈希
docs.text:
template <uInt B> struct string_hash {
public:
    string_hash(const std::string &s = "", const char offset = 'a')
    : n(s.size()), hash(s.size() + 1, 1), base(s.size() + 1) {
        for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) {
            base[i + 1] = base[i] * B;
            hash[i + 1] = hash[i] + (s[i] - offset) * base[i];
        }
    }
    auto query(int l, int r) -> uInt {
        return (hash[r] - hash[l - 1]) * base[n - l + 1];
    }
private:
    int n;
    std::vector<uInt> hash, base;
};

docs.title: Codefoces Round 969 A - Iris and Game on the Tree
题意
docs.text: 如果根到叶子的路径中，根和叶子上的权值相同，那么贡献为 $1$，否则贡献为 $0$，现在两人可以涂权值为 $?$ 的节点，一人最大化得分，一人最小化得分，问你最后得分为多少

docs.title: 思路
docs.text: 考虑根是否可涂，贪心模拟即可

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

auto code() -> void {
    int n;
    std::cin >> n;

    std::vector<std::vector<int>> e(n + 1);
    for (int i = 2; i <= n; i++) {
        int u, v;
        std::cin >> u >> v;
        e[u].push_back(v);
        e[v].push_back(u);
    }

    std::string s;
    std::cin >> s;
    s = '#' + s;

    int leaf_cnt[3] = {0, 0, 0};
    int path_cnt[3] = {0, 0, 0};
    for (int i = 2; i <= n; i++) {
        if (e[i].size() == 1) {
            if (s[i] == '0' || s[i] == '1')
                leaf_cnt[s[i] - '0']++;
            else
                leaf_cnt[2]++;
        } else {
            if (s[i] == '0' || s[i] == '1')
                path_cnt[s[i] - '0']++;
            else
                path_cnt[2]++;
        }
    }

    if (s[1] == '?') {
        if (path_cnt[2] % 2 == 1 && leaf_cnt[0] == leaf_cnt[1]) {
            std::cout << leaf_cnt[0] + (leaf_cnt[2] + 1) / 2 << '\n';
        } else {
            std::cout << std::max(leaf_cnt[0], leaf_cnt[1]) + leaf_cnt[2] / 2 << '\n';
        }
    } else {
        std::cout << leaf_cnt[s[1] ^ '0' ^ 1] + (leaf_cnt[2] + 1) / 2 << '\n';
    }
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);

    for (int i = 1, n = (std::cin >> n, n); i <= n; ++i)
        code();

    return 0;
}

docs.title: Codeforces Round 969 B - Iris and the Tree
Tag: 最近公共祖先，树上差分，启发式合并
题意
docs.text: 给你一颗有 $n$ 个节点的树，现在有总共 $W$ 的权值需要分配到每一条边上，对于 $i$ 和 $i \ \% n \ + 1$ 简单路径上的边，权重均需要 $+1$，现在问你 $n - 1$ 次，每次给一条边分配权值，问分配之后，剩下的权值任你分配，最后得到的 $\sum_{i = 2}^{n}max(权值 * 权重)$ 为多少

docs.title: 思路
docs.text:
先树上差分，将每条路径的权重求出来，再考虑一条路径是如何被确定最终权值的，即我当前已经分配的边使得 $i$ 和 $i \% n + 1$ 是连通的，用启发式合并模拟即可

复杂度 $O(nlogn)$

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

struct disjoint_set_union {
public:
    disjoint_set_union(int n)
    : f(n + 1), g(n + 1) {
        for (int i = 1; i <= n; ++i) f[i] = i, g[i] = 1;
    }
    auto find(int x) -> int {
        return x == f[x] ? x : f[x] = find(f[x]);
    }
    auto check(int x, int y) -> bool {
        return find(x) == find(y);
    }
    auto merge(int x, int y) -> void {
        if ((x = find(x)) == (y = find(y)))
            return;
        if (g[x] >= g[y])
            g[x] += g[y], f[y] = x;
        else    
            g[y] += g[x], f[x] = y;
    }
private:
    std::vector<int> f, g;
};

template <typename Edge> struct lowest_common_ancestor {
public:
    lowest_common_ancestor(int n, int root, std::vector<std::vector<Edge>> &G)
    : dfn(n + 1), f(std::__lg(n) + 1, std::vector<int>(n + 1)) {
        int timer = 0;
        auto dfs = [&](auto &&self, int u, int p) -> void {
            dfn[u] = ++timer;
            f[0][timer] = p;

            for (auto &[v] : G[u]) {
                if (v == p) continue;
                self(self, v, u);
            }
        };
        dfs(dfs, root, 0);

        for (int k = 1; k <= std::__lg(n); ++k) {
            for (int i = 1; i + (1 << k) - 1 <= n; ++i) {
                f[k][i] = check(f[k - 1][i], f[k - 1][i + (1 << k - 1)]);
            }
        }
    }
    auto check(const int x, const int y) -> int {
        return dfn[x] < dfn[y] ? x : y;
    }
    auto query(int x, int y) -> int {
        if (x == y)
            return x;
        if (dfn[x] > dfn[y])
            std::swap(x, y);
        int k = std::__lg(y - x);
        return check(f[k][x + 1], f[k][y - (1 << k) + 1]);
    }
private:
    std::vector<int> dfn;
    std::vector<std::vector<int>> f;
};

struct edge {
    int v;
};

auto code() -> void {
    Int n, w;
    std::cin >> n >> w;

    std::vector<int> fa(n + 1);
    std::vector<std::vector<edge>> e(n + 1);
    for (int v = 2; v <= n; v++) {
        std::cin >> fa[v];
        e[fa[v]].push_back({v});
    }

    std::vector<Int> f(n + 1);
    lowest_common_ancestor<edge> lca(n, 1, e);
    for (int u = 1, v = 2; u <= n; v = ++u % n + 1) {
        int p = lca.query(u, v);
        f[u]++, f[v]++, f[p] -= 2; 
    }

    auto dfs = [&](auto &&self, int u, int p) -> void {
        for (auto &[v] : e[u]) {
            if (v == p) continue;
            self(self, v, u);
            f[u] += f[v];
        }
    };
    dfs(dfs, 1, 0);

    disjoint_set_union dsu(n);
    std::unordered_set<int> set[n + 1];
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
        set[i].insert(i);

    Int sum = 0, cur = n;
    for (int i = 2; i <= n; i++) {
        Int x, y;
        std::cin >> x >> y;
        sum += y * f[x];
        w -= y;

        int pidx = dsu.find(fa[x]);
        int nidx = dsu.find(x);
        dsu.merge(nidx, pidx);

        if (set[pidx].size() <= set[nidx].size())
            std::swap(pidx, nidx);

        for (auto &v : set[nidx]) {
            if (set[pidx].count(v % n + 1)) cur--;
            if (set[pidx].count(v == 1 ? n : v - 1)) cur--;
        }

        set[pidx].insert(set[nidx].begin(), set[nidx].end());

        std::cout << sum + cur * w << " \n"[i == n];
    }
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);

    for (int i = 1, n = (std::cin >> n, n); i <= n; ++i)
        code();

    return 0;
}

docs.title: Codeforces Round 969 C - Eri and Expanded Sets
题意
docs.text: 给你一个大小为 $n$ 的序列，对于每个区间 $[L, R] (1 \le L \le R \le n)$，现在你可以在这个集合内取出两个不同的数若干次，但需求两个数之和为偶数，然后将他们的平均数放入集合中，如果最后所得集合排序后是一个连续的序列，形如：$1, 2, 3, ..., k$，即为一个合法的区间，现在问你一共有多少个合法区间

docs.title: 思路
docs.text:
考虑 $x - y = 2$ 的情况，会发现，直接一次即可，那么 $x - y = 3$ 的情况呢？会发现不合法

再考虑大的情况到小的情况是如何转换的 $x - y = k$ 会变成 $x - m = k - b$ 和 $m - y = b$

然后不断分治下去，如果这里面最后有个小块为 $3$ 那么也就不合法

现在再看如果有多个数的情况 $x < y < z$

如果 $z - x$ 分到最后最小块为奇数，而 $y - x$ 或 $z - y$ 分到最后为偶数，会发现最后块与块之间是重叠的，这个过程其实可以看做辗转相除法的过程，那么我们多个数只需要考虑他们差值的 $Gcd$ 即可

故如果 $Gcd(d_i) = lowbit(d_i)$ 那么就是合法的

这里还有一个应该较广为人知的知识点（可能吧），前缀 $Gcd$ 最多 $log$ 个

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

auto code() -> void {
    int n;
    std::cin >> n;

    std::vector<Int> a(n + 1), d(n + 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
        std::cin >> a[i];
        d[i] = abs(a[i] - a[i - 1]);
    }

    Int ans = n, gcd = 0;
    std::vector<std::array<Int, 2>> g;
    for (int i = 2; i <= n; i++) {
        gcd = d[i];
        for (int j = (int)g.size() - 1; j >= 0; j--) {
            g[j][0] = gcd = std::gcd(gcd, g[j][0]);
        }
        g.push_back({d[i], 1});

        int m = 0;
        for (int j = 1; j < g.size(); j++) {
            if (g[m][0] == g[j][0])
                g[m][1] += g[j][1];
            else
                g[++m] = g[j];
        }
        g.resize(m + 1);

        for (auto &[x, y] : g)
            if (x == (x & -x)) ans += y;
    }

    std::cout << ans << '\n';
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);

    for (int i = 1, n = (std::cin >> n, n); i <= n; ++i)
        code();

    return 0;
}

docs.title: Codeforces 969 D - Iris and Adjacent Products
题意
docs.text:
给你一个大小为 $n$ 的数组 $b$，你有两个操作:

  • 将 $[L, R]$ 的数进行重排
  • 将任意 $b_i$ 更改为 $1 \le b_i \le k$

现有 $q$ 次询问，每次询问一个范围在 $[L, R]$ 的子数组，需要满足 $L \le i < R，b_i · b_{i + 1} \le k$

你可以使用任意次操作，但要使得操作 $2$ 的次数最少，每个询问输出这个最小操作数

docs.title: 思路
docs.text:
首先考虑最优排列方式，设 $a_1 < a_2 < ... < a_m$

每个值均尽量去与其上限匹配即可，因为总乘积是一样的（贪心）

那么放置的方式就是: 最大，最小，次大，次小 ......

又由于根号这个神奇的分解，所以我们也只需要遍历 $\sqrt{k}$ 个即可

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

auto binary_sqrt(uInt n) -> uInt {
    uInt x = 0, y;
    for (int i = 31; i >= 0; --i) {
        y = x | (1LL << i);
        if (y * y <= n)
            x = y;
        if (y * y == n)
            return y;
    }
    return x;
}

auto code() -> void {
    int n, q, k;
    std::cin >> n >> q >> k;

    std::vector<int> a(n + 1), b(n + 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
        std::cin >> b[i];
        a[i] = k / b[i];
    }

    std::vector<std::array<int, 2>> query(q + 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= q; i++)
        std::cin >> query[i][0] >> query[i][1];

    int B = binary_sqrt(k);
    std::vector<int> pref_a(n + 1), pref_b(n + 1), val(q + 1), tag(q + 1, 1);
    for (int t = B; t >= 1; t--) {
        for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
            pref_a[i] = pref_a[i - 1] + (b[i] == t);
            pref_b[i] = pref_b[i - 1] + (b[i] > B && a[i] == t);
        }
        for (int i = 1; i <= q; i++) {
            int cnt_a = pref_a[query[i][1]] - pref_a[query[i][0] - 1];
            int cnt_b = pref_b[query[i][1]] - pref_b[query[i][0] - 1];
            val[i] += cnt_b;
            if (cnt_a > 0) {
                val[i] = std::max(0, val[i] - cnt_a - tag[i]);
                tag[i] = 0;
            }
        }
    }

    for (int i = 1; i <= q; i++)
        std::cout << (val[i] + !tag[i]) / 2 << " \n"[i == q];
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);

    for (int i = 1, n = (std::cin >> n, n); i <= n; ++i)
        code();

    return 0;
}

docs.title: Codeforces Round 976 A - Find Minimum Operations
题意
docs.text: 给你一个 $n$ 和一个 $k$，n 每次可以减去 $k^x$，问最少几次操作可以减到 $0$

docs.title: 思路
docs.text: 直接模拟即可

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

auto code() -> void {
    Int n, k;
    std::cin >> n >> k;

    if (k == 1)
        return (void)(std::cout << n << '\n');

    Int a = 0, b = 1;
    while (b < n)
        b *= k;
    while (n) {
        while (b > n)
            b /= k;
        a += n / b;
        n %= b;
    }

    std::cout << a << '\n';
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {

docs.title: 题意
docs.text: 对于 $1 ... n$ 中，因子数为奇数的数是 $0$，因子数为偶数的数是 $1$，现在问 $\sum_{i = 1}^{n}[i] = k$，最小的 $n$ 是多少

docs.title: 思路
docs.text: 考虑一个数因子数量怎么才为奇数，因为因子是一一对应的关系，所以这个数一定是个完全平方数

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

auto binary_sqrt(uInt n) -> uInt {
    uInt x = 0, y;
    for (int i = 31; i >= 0; --i) {
        y = x | (1LL << i);
        if (y * y <= n)
            x = y;
        if (y * y == n)
            return y;
    }
    return x;
}

auto code() -> void {
    Int k;
    std::cin >> k;

    auto check = [&](Int x) -> bool {
        return x - binary_sqrt(x) >= k;
    };

    Int l = 2, r = 2e18;
    while (l + 1 < r) {
        Int m = l + r >> 1;
        if (check(m))
            r = m;
        else
            l = m;
    }

    if (check(l))
        std::cout << l << '\n';
    else    
        std::cout << r << '\n';
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);

    for (int i = 1, n = (std::cin >> n, n); i <= n; ++i)
        code();

    return 0;
}

docs.title: Codeforces Round 976 D - Connect the Dots
题意
docs.text: 现在你有 $n$ 个孤立的点，每次给出一个点集，将其内的点并做一个连通块，问最后剩几个连通块

docs.title: 思路
docs.text: 考虑 $d$ 的数据范围只有 $1 \le d \le 10$，那么只需要暴力模拟即可

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

struct disjoint_set_union {
public:
    disjoint_set_union(int n)
    : f(n + 1), g(n + 1) {
        for (int i = 1; i <= n; ++i) f[i] = i, g[i] = 1;
    }
    auto find(int x) -> int {
        return x == f[x] ? x : f[x] = find(f[x]);
    }
    auto check(int x, int y) -> bool {
        return find(x) == find(y);
    }
    auto merge(int x, int y) -> void {
        if ((x = find(x)) == (y = find(y)))
            return;
        if (g[x] >= g[y])
            g[x] += g[y], f[y] = x;
        else    
            g[y] += g[x], f[x] = y;
    }
private:
    std::vector<int> f, g;
};

auto code() -> void {
    int n, m;
    std::cin >> n >> m;

    std::vector D(11, std::vector(n + 1, std::array<int, 2>()));
    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++) {
        int a, d, k;
        std::cin >> a >> d >> k;
        D[d][a][0]++;
        D[d][a + d * k][1]++;
    }

    disjoint_set_union dsu(n);
    std::vector<int> stk;
    for (int d = 1; d <= 10; d++) {
        for (int i = 1; i <= d; i++) {
            stk.clear();
            for (int j = i; j <= n; j += d) {
                if (!stk.empty())
                    dsu.merge(stk.back(), j);
                while (D[d][j][0]--)
                    stk.push_back(j);
                while (D[d][j][1]--)
                    stk.pop_back();
            }
        }
    }

    int ans = 0;
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
        if (dsu.find(i) == i) ans++;

    std::cout << ans << '\n';
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);

    for (int i = 1, n = (std::cin >> n, n); i <= n; ++i)
        code();

    return 0;
}

docs.title: 题意
docs.text: 现在你有 $n$ 个数，每个数有 $\frac{p_i}{10^4}$ 的概率放入集合中，设 $f(S)$ 为最后集合内所有数异或的最终值期望，求 $f(S)^2$ 是多少

docs.title: 思路
docs.text: 直接 $O(1024n)$ 动态规划即可

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

constexpr Int mod = 1e9 + 7;

template <typename T>
constexpr auto quick_power(T a, uInt b, T res = T(1)) -> T {
    for (; b; a *= a, b >>= 1) if (b & 1) res *= a; return res;
}

template <Int P> struct mod_int {
public:
    static Int M;
    constexpr static Int get_mod() {
        return P ? P : M;
    }
    constexpr static void set_mod(Int _M) {
        M = _M;
    }
    constexpr mod_int(Int _x = 0)
    : x(check(_x % get_mod())) {}
    constexpr Int check(Int val) const {
        if (val < 0)
            val += get_mod();
        if (val >= get_mod())
            val -= get_mod();
        return val;
    }
    constexpr mod_int inv() const {
        return quick_power(*this, get_mod() - 2);
    }
    constexpr mod_int operator - () const {
        return mod_int(check(get_mod() - *this));
    }
    constexpr mod_int &operator += (mod_int other) & { this->x = check(this->x + other.x); return *this; }
    constexpr mod_int &operator -= (mod_int other) & { this->x = check(this->x - other.x); return *this; }
    constexpr mod_int &operator *= (mod_int other) & { this->x = check(this->x * other.x % get_mod()); return *this; }
    constexpr mod_int &operator /= (mod_int other) & { this->x = check(this->x * other.inv() % get_mod()); return *this; }
    friend constexpr mod_int operator + (mod_int l, mod_int r) { return l += r; }
    friend constexpr mod_int operator - (mod_int l, mod_int r) { return l -= r; }
    friend constexpr mod_int operator * (mod_int l, mod_int r) { return l *= r; }
    friend constexpr mod_int operator / (mod_int l, mod_int r) { return l /= r; }
    friend constexpr bool operator == (mod_int l, mod_int r) { return l.x == r.x; }
    friend constexpr bool operator != (mod_int l, mod_int r) { return l.x != r.x; }
    friend constexpr std::istream &operator >> (std::istream &is, mod_int &val) {
        return is >> val.x, val = mod_int(val.x), is;
    }
    friend constexpr std::ostream &operator << (std::ostream &os, const mod_int &val) {
        return os << val.x;
    }
private:
    Int x;
};

using mInt = mod_int<mod>;

auto code() -> void {
    int n;
    std::cin >> n;

    std::vector<Int> a(n + 1);
    std::vector<mInt> P(n + 1), invP(n + 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
        std::cin >> a[i];
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
        int tmp; std::cin >> tmp;
        P[i] = tmp * mInt(10000).inv();
        invP[i] = (10000 - tmp) * mInt(10000).inv();
    }

    mInt pref = 1;
    std::vector<mInt> cnt(1024);
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
        std::vector<mInt> select(1024), noselect(1024);
        for (int j = 0; j < 1024; j++) {
            select[j ^ a[i]] += cnt[j] * P[i];
            noselect[j] += cnt[j] * invP[i];
        }
        for (int j = 0; j < 1024; j++) {
            cnt[j] = select[j] + noselect[j];
        }
        cnt[a[i]] += pref * P[i];
        pref *= invP[i];
    }

    mInt ans = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < 1024; i++) {
        ans += i * i * cnt[i];
    }

    std::cout << ans << '\n';
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);

    for (int i = 1, n = (std::cin >> n, n); i <= n; ++i)
        code();

    return 0;
}

docs.title: 题意
docs.text: 构造一个满足条件的 $01$ 矩阵

docs.title: 思路
docs.text:
注意力惊人题，神秘构造

考虑先将所有的 $+$ 均填上 $1$，那么横轴和/纵轴和只会存在大于 $0$ 的情况，如果还有小于 $0$ 的，那么直接输出 $No$

接下来再考虑如何填 $-$ 和缩减 $+$ 使得所有限制均满足条件

考虑填一个 $-$ 会使得横轴和/纵轴和 $-1$，缩减一个 $+$ 同理

那么不妨每次填纵轴和最小的 $x$ 个即可，暴力排序模拟

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

auto code() -> void {
    int n;
    std::cin >> n;

    std::vector<std::vector<int>> c(n + 1, std::vector<int>(n + 1));
    std::vector<std::vector<int>> s(n + 1, std::vector<int>(n + 1));
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
        std::string s; std::cin >> s;
        for (int j = 1; j <= n; j++) {
            c[i][j] = (s[j - 1] == '+' ? 1 : -1);
        }
    }

    std::vector<int> x(n + 1), y(n + 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) std::cin >> x[i];
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) std::cin >> y[i];

    auto select = [&](int i, int j) -> void {
        s[i][j] ^= 1, x[i] -= c[i][j], y[j] -= c[i][j], c[i][j] = -c[i][j];
    };

    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
        for (int j = 1; j <= n; j++)
            if (c[i][j] > 0) select(i, j);

    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
        if (x[i] > 0 || y[i] > 0) return (void)(std::cout << "No\n");

    std::vector<int> xid(n + 2), yid(n + 2);
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) xid[i] = yid[i] = i;

    std::sort(xid.begin() + 1, xid.begin() + n + 1, [&](int l, int r) { return x[l] < x[r]; });
    for (int i = 1, ii = xid[i]; i <= n; ii = xid[++i]) {
        std::sort(yid.begin() + 1, yid.begin() + n + 1, [&](int l, int r) { return y[l] < y[r]; });
        for (int j = 1, jj = yid[j]; j <= n; jj = yid[++j]) {
            if (x[ii] == 0 || y[jj] == 0) continue;
            select(ii, jj);
        }
    }

    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
        if (x[i] || y[i]) return (void)(std::cout << "No\n");

    std::cout << "Yes\n";
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
        for (int j = 1; j <= n; j++)
            std::cout << s[i][j];
        std::cout << '\n';
    }
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);

    // for (int i = 1, n = (std::cin >> n, n); i <= n; ++i)
        code();

    return 0;
}

docs.title: Tag: 图论，模拟，分类讨论
题意
docs.text:
给你一张无向图 $G(V, E)$，节点的度最多为 $3$，每条边均有颜色 $0/1$，问你有多少个导出子图满足:

  • 只看颜色为 $0$ 的边，图连通
  • 只看颜色为 $1$ 的边，图连通

docs.title: 思路
docs.text:
由于节点的度最多为 $3$，那么节点数为 $n$ 的导出子图，最多有 $\lfloor \frac{3}{2} n \rfloor$ 条边，又由于需要满足连通的条件，那么两种颜色各至少需要 $n - 1$ 条边

那么我们可以建立以下不等式:

$$ 2 · (n - 1) \le \frac{3}{2} n $$

可以解得 $n \le 4$，所以我们只需要去讨论这个导出子图大小小于等于 $4$ 的情况就可以了

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

auto code() -> void {
    int n, m;
    std::cin >> n >> m;

    Int ans[5] = {0, n, 0, 0, 0};
    std::vector cnt(2, std::vector(n + 1, std::unordered_set<int>()));
    std::vector e(2, std::vector<std::vector<int>>(n + 1));

    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++) {
        int u, v, c;
        std::cin >> u >> v >> c;
        e[c][u].emplace_back(v);
        e[c][v].emplace_back(u);
        cnt[c][u].insert(v);
        cnt[c][v].insert(u);
    }

    for (int u = 1; u <= n; u++) {
        for (auto &v : e[0][u]) {
            if (cnt[1][u].count(v)) ans[2]++;
        }
    }
    ans[2] /= 2;

    for (int u = 1; u <= n; u++) {
        for (int i = 0; i < e[0][u].size(); i++) {
            for (int j = i + 1; j < e[0][u].size(); j++) {
                if (e[0][u][i] == e[0][u][j]) continue;
                int &v1 = e[0][u][i];
                int &v2 = e[0][u][j];

                int cnt_degree = 0;
                if (cnt[1][u].count(v1)) cnt_degree++;
                if (cnt[1][u].count(v2)) cnt_degree++;
                if (cnt[1][v1].count(v2)) cnt_degree++;
                if (cnt_degree == 2) ans[3]++;
            }
        }
    }

    auto dfs = [&](auto &&self, int u, std::vector<int> &V) -> void {
        if (V.size() == 4) {
            int cnt_degree = 0;
            for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
                for (int j = i + 1; j < 4; j++) {
                    int &u1 = V[i];
                    int &u2 = V[j];
                    if (cnt[1][u1].count(u2)) cnt_degree++;
                }
            }
            if (cnt_degree == 3) ans[4]++;
        } else {
            for (auto &v : e[0][u]) {
                if (std::count(V.begin(), V.end(), v) == 1) continue;
                V.push_back(v);
                self(self, v, V);
                V.pop_back();
            }
        }
    };

    for (int u = 1; u <= n; u++) {
        std::vector<int> v;
        v.push_back(u);
        dfs(dfs, u, v);
    }
    ans[4] /= 2;

    std::cout << ans[1] + ans[2] + ans[3] + ans[4] << '\n';
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);

    // for (int i = 1, n = (std::cin >> n, n); i <= n; ++i)
        code();

    return 0;
}

docs.title: 题意
docs.text: 每次可隔 $a$ 秒获得 $160$ 的贡献，在冷却的时候可以使用一次刷新，使得贡献操作刷新，但刷新操作也自身进入 $b$ 秒的冷却，问 $m$ 秒内，最优操作可以获得多少贡献

docs.title: 思路
docs.text:
考虑刷新操作肯定是每次使用最佳

那么考虑 $b$ 秒冷却时，中间可以进行 $\lfloor \frac{b}{a} \rfloor$ 次 贡献操作，再加上刷新后又可以立即使用一次，就是 $\lfloor \frac{b}{a} \rfloor + 1$ 次操作

如果我们最后再等待一下，使得还可以再多使用一次贡献操作的话，就是可以进行 $\lceil \frac{b}{a} \rceil + 1$ 次操作

那么直接 $O(m)$ 转移即可

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

auto code() -> void {
    int a, b, m;
    std::cin >> a >> b >> m;

    std::vector<int> f(m + 1);
    f[0] = 2;

    int res = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i <= m; i++) {
        if (!f[i]) continue;
        res = std::max(res, f[i] + (m - i) / a);
        if (i + b <= m)
            f[i + b] = std::max(f[i + b], f[i] + (1 + b / a));
        if (i + (b + a - 1) / a * a <= m)
            f[i + (b + a - 1) / a * a] = std::max(f[i + (b + a - 1) / a * a], f[i] + (1 + (b + a - 1) / a));
    }

    std::cout << res * 160 << '\n';
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);

    for (int i = 1, n = (std::cin >> n, n); i <= n; ++i)
        code();

    return 0;
}

docs.title: 题意
docs.text:
你初始点在 $0$，需要到达 $x$，对于每秒你均可以进行以下两种操作之一:

  • 到达 $(i + a_i) \ mod \ n$ 处
  • $a_i = a_i + 1$

问到达 $x$ 最少需要几秒

docs.title: 思路
docs.text:
考虑建图，一种是已经使用过一次传送的 $i + n$，一种是暂未使用传送的 $i$

只需要将 $(i, n + (i + a_i) \ mod \n)，(n + i, n + (i + 1) \ mod \ n)，(n + i, i)$ 进行连边即可

跑 $01$ $BFS$ 即可

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

struct edge {
    int v, w;
    edge()
    : v(0), w(0) {}
    edge(int _v, int _w)
    : v(_v), w(_w) {}
};

auto code() -> void {
    int n, x;
    std::cin >> n >> x;

    std::vector<std::vector<edge>> e(2 * n);
    for (int u = 0, v; u < n; u++) {
        std::cin >> v;
        e[u].emplace_back(n + (u + v) % n, 1);
        e[u + n].emplace_back(n + (u + 1) % n, 1);
        e[u + n].emplace_back(u, 0);
    }

    std::vector<int> dis(2 * n, 1e6);
    dis[0] = 0;

    std::queue<int> q;
    q.push(0);

    while (!q.empty()) {
        auto u = q.front(); q.pop();
        for (auto &[v, w] : e[u]) {
            if (dis[v] > dis[u] + w) {
                dis[v] = dis[u] + w;
                q.push(v);
            }
        }
    }

    std::cout << dis[x] << '\n';
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);

    // for (int i = 1, n = (std::cin >> n, n); i <= n; ++i)
        code();

    return 0;
}

docs.title: Luogu P1429 - 平面最近点对（加强版）
题意
docs.text: 查找二维平面上的 $n$ 个点之间的最小距离

docs.title: 思路
docs.text:
考虑分治，每次将当前 $x$ 的中位数作为分界线，由于我的左部分最小 $dis$ 和我的右部分最小 $dis$ 是可以确定的，那么如果中间部分有更优的 $dis$ 的话则需要枚举

由于我令 $x$ 的中位数作为了分界线，那么也就有，$x - x_{mid} \le min(dis_l, dis_r)$ 的点才符合我去枚举的条件

然后再顺序枚举一下即可

总复杂度 $O(nlogn)$

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

#define P(X, Y) ((X - Y) * (X - Y))
#define D(X, Y) (P(X.x, Y.x) + P(X.y, Y.y))

constexpr Int INF = 4e18;

struct pos {
    Int x, y;
};

auto code() -> void {
    int n;
    std::cin >> n;

    std::vector<pos> p(n + 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
        std::cin >> p[i].x >> p[i].y;
    std::sort(p.begin() + 1, p.end(), [](pos &l, pos &r) {
        return l.x < r.x;
    });

    auto merge = [&](int l, int m, int r) -> void {
        static std::vector<pos> tmp(n + 1);
        int idx = l, L = l, R = m + 1;
        while (L <= m && R <= r) {
            if (p[L].y < p[R].y)
                tmp[idx++] = p[L++];
            else
                tmp[idx++] = p[R++];
        }
        while (L <= m) tmp[idx++] = p[L++];
        while (R <= r) tmp[idx++] = p[R++];
        for (int i = l; i <= r; i++) p[i] = tmp[i];
    };

    auto dfs = [&](auto &&self, int l, int r) -> Int {
        if (l == r) return INF;
        if (l + 1 == r) {
            if (p[l].y > p[r].y)
                std::swap(p[l], p[r]);
            return D(p[l], p[r]);
        }

        int m = l + r >> 1;
        Int mid = p[m].x;
        Int dis = std::min(self(self, l, m), self(self, m + 1, r));
        merge(l, m, r);

        std::vector<pos> tmp;
        for (int i = l; i <= r; i++) {
            if (P(p[i].x, mid) < dis) tmp.push_back(p[i]);
        }

        for (int i = 0; i < tmp.size(); i++) {
            for (int j = i + 1; j < tmp.size() && P(tmp[i].y, tmp[j].y) < dis; j++) {
                dis = std::min(dis, D(tmp[i], tmp[j]));
            }
        }

        return dis;
    };

    std::cout << sqrt((double)(dfs(dfs, 1, n))) << '\n';
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);
    std::cout << std::fixed << std::setprecision(4);

    // for (int i = 1, n = (std::cin >> n, n); i <= n; ++i)
        code();

    return 0;
}

docs.title: 题意
docs.text: 给你 $n$ 个点，每个点均有一个价值 $x$，查询每个大小为 $H \times W$ 的矩阵的最大价值和

docs.title: 思路
docs.text: 转换为扫描线问题即可

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

template <typename Info, typename Lazy> struct segment_tree {
public:
    #define lson (p << 1)
    #define rson (p << 1 | 1)
    segment_tree(int _n)
    : n(_n), f(4 << std::__lg(_n)), g(4 << std::__lg(_n)) {}
    segment_tree(std::vector<Info> info)
    : segment_tree(info.size() - 1) {
        auto build = [&](auto &&self, int p, int l, int r) -> void {
            if (l == r) return (void)(f[p] = info[l]);
            int m = l + r >> 1;
            self(self, lson, l, m);
            self(self, rson, m + 1, r);
            push_up(p);
        };
        build(build, 1, 1, n);
    }
    auto push_up(int p) -> void {
        f[p] = f[lson] + f[rson];
    }
    auto push_down(int p) -> void {
        f[lson] += g[p], g[lson] += g[p];
        f[rson] += g[p], g[rson] += g[p];
        g[p] = Lazy();
    }
    auto update(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, Lazy x) -> void {
        if (R <  l || r <  L) return;
        if (L <= l && r <= R) return (void)(f[p] += x, g[p] += x);
        push_down(p);
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        update(lson, l, m, L, R, x);
        update(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, x);
        push_up(p);
    }
    auto query(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R) -> Info {
        if (R <  l || r <  L) return Info();
        if (L <= l && r <= R) return f[p];
        push_down(p);
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        return query(lson, l, m, L, R) + query(rson, m + 1, r, L, R);
    }
    auto find_first(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, auto &check) -> int {
        if (R < l || r > L || !check(f[p])) return -1;
        if (l == r) return l;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        int res = find_first(lson, l, m, L, R, check);
        if (res == -1)
            return find_first(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, check);
        else
            return res;
    }
    auto find_last(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, auto &check) -> int {
        if (R < l || r > L || !check(f[p])) return -1;
        if (l == r) return l;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        int res = find_last(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, check);
        if (res == -1)
            return find_last(lson, l, m, L, R, check);
        else
            return res;
    }
    #undef lson
    #undef rson
private:
    int n;
    std::vector<Info> f;
    std::vector<Lazy> g;
};

struct lazy {
    Int val;
    lazy()
    : val(0) {}
    lazy(Int _val)
    : val(_val) {}
    lazy &operator += (lazy tag) {
        return val += tag.val, *this;
    }  
};

struct info {
    Int val;
    info()
    : val(0) {}
    info(Int _val)
    : val(_val) {}
    info &operator += (lazy tag) {
        return val += tag.val, *this;
    }
    friend info operator + (info l, info r) {
        return info(std::max(l.val, r.val));
    }
};

auto code() -> void {
    int n, X, Y;
    std::cin >> n >> X >> Y;

    std::vector<int> all;
    std::vector<std::array<int, 3>> pos;
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
        int x, y, v;
        std::cin >> x >> y >> v;
        all.push_back(y);
        all.push_back(y - Y + 1);
        pos.push_back({x, y, v});
        pos.push_back({x + X, y, -v});
    }

    std::sort(pos.begin(), pos.end(), [&](auto &l, auto &r) {
        if (l[0] != r[0])
            return l[0] < r[0];
        else
            return l[1] < r[1];
    });
    std::sort(all.begin(), all.end());
    all.erase(std::unique(all.begin(), all.end()), all.end());

    auto rank = [&all](int x) -> int {
        return std::lower_bound(all.begin(), all.end(), x) - all.begin() + 1;
    };

    Int res = 0, m = all.size();
    segment_tree<info, lazy> seg(m);

    for (int i = 0; i < pos.size() - 1; i++) {
        auto [x, y, v] = pos[i];
        seg.update(1, 1, m, rank(y - Y + 1), rank(y), lazy(v));
        if (x != pos[i + 1][0])
            res = std::max(res, seg.query(1, 1, m, 1, m).val);
    }

    std::cout << res << '\n';
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);

    for (int i = 1, n = (std::cin >> n, n); i <= n; ++i)
        code();

    return 0;
}

docs.title: 题意
docs.text: 每次询问 $[L, R]$ 区间的端点值是否是区间最大值和次大值，且 $val_L > val_R$，中间有一些值没有给出

docs.title: 思路
docs.text: 处理每个数的前一个最大值位置，和后一个最大值位置，分类讨论即可

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

auto code() -> void {
    int n;
    std::cin >> n;

    std::map<int, int> cnt;
    std::vector<int> all = {(int)(-2e9)};
    std::vector<std::pair<int, int>> info(n + 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
        std::cin >> info[i].first >> info[i].second;
        cnt[info[i].first] = info[i].second;
        all.push_back(info[i].first);
    }
    info[0].first = all[0];

    std::vector<int> pre_max(n + 1), stk1;
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
        while (!stk1.empty() && info[stk1.back()].second < info[i].second)
            stk1.pop_back();
        if (!stk1.empty())
            pre_max[i] = stk1.back();
        stk1.push_back(i);
    }

    std::vector<int> nxt_max(n + 1), stk2;
    for (int i = n; i >= 1; i--) {
        while (!stk2.empty() && info[stk2.back()].second < info[i].second)
            stk2.pop_back();
        if (!stk2.empty())
            nxt_max[i] = stk2.back();
        stk2.push_back(i);
    }

    int m;
    std::cin >> m;

    auto count = [&](int x) -> bool {
        return std::binary_search(all.begin(), all.end(), x);
    };

    auto rank = [&](int x) -> int {
        return std::lower_bound(all.begin(), all.end(), x) - all.begin();
    };

    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++) {
        int x, y;
        std::cin >> x >> y;

        if (!count(x) && !count(y)) {
            std::cout << "maybe\n";
        } else if (!count(x)) {
            int idx_y = rank(y);
            if (x < info[pre_max[idx_y]].first) {
                std::cout << "false\n";
            } else {
                std::cout << "maybe\n";
            }
        } else if (!count(y)) {
            int idx_x = rank(x);
            if (nxt_max[idx_x] != 0 && info[nxt_max[idx_x]].first < y) {
                std::cout << "false\n";
            } else {
                std::cout << "maybe\n";
            }
        } else {
            int idx_x = rank(x), idx_y = rank(y);
            if (info[idx_x].second < info[idx_y].second) {
                std::cout << "false\n";
            } else if (idx_x < pre_max[idx_y]) {
                std::cout << "false\n";
            } else if (idx_y - idx_x != y - x) {
                std::cout << "maybe\n";
            } else {
                std::cout << "true\n";
            }
        }
    }
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);

    // for (int i = 1, n = (std::cin >> n, n); i <= n; ++i)
        code();

    return 0;
}

docs.title: 题意
docs.text: 维护一个大小为 $n$ 的序列，共 $m$ 次询问，每次询问输出 $[L, R]$ 区间内最大子数组和

docs.title: 思路
docs.text: 线段树上维护前缀最大，后缀最大，以及中间最大即可

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

template <typename Info> struct segment_tree {
public:
    #define lson (p << 1)
    #define rson (p << 1 | 1)
    segment_tree(int _n)
    : n(_n), f(4 << std::__lg(_n)) {}
    segment_tree(std::vector<Info> info)
    : segment_tree(info.size() - 1) {
        auto build = [&](auto &&self, int p, int l, int r) -> void {
            if (l == r) return (void)(f[p] = info[l]);
            int m = l + r >> 1;
            self(self, lson, l, m);
            self(self, rson, m + 1, r);
            push_up(p);
        };
        build(build, 1, 1, n);
    }
    auto push_up(int p) -> void {
        f[p] = f[lson] + f[rson];
    }
    auto update(int p, int l, int r, int u, Info x) -> void {
        if (u < l || r < u) return;
        if (l == r) return (void)(f[p] = x);
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        update(lson, l, m, u, x);
        update(rson, m + 1, r, u, x);
        push_up(p);
    }
    auto query(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R) -> Info {
        if (R <  l || r <  L) return Info();
        if (L <= l && r <= R) return f[p];
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        return query(lson, l, m, L, R) + query(rson, m + 1, r, L, R);
    }
    auto find_first(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, auto &check) -> int {
        if (R < l || r > L || !check(f[p])) return -1;
        if (l == r) return l;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        int res = find_first(lson, l, m, L, R, check);
        if (res == -1)
            return find_first(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, check);
        else
            return res;
    }
    auto find_last(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, auto &check) -> int {
        if (R < l || r > L || !check(f[p])) return -1;
        if (l == r) return l;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        int res = find_last(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, check);
        if (res == -1)
            return find_last(lson, l, m, L, R, check);
        else
            return res;
    }
    #undef lson
    #undef rson
private:
    int n;
    std::vector<Info> f;
};

constexpr Int INV_INF = -1e18;

struct info {
    Int pref, suff, sum, res;
    info()
    : pref(INV_INF), suff(INV_INF), sum(INV_INF), res(INV_INF) {}
    info(Int _pref, Int _suff, Int _sum, Int _res)
    : pref(_pref), suff(_suff), sum(_sum), res(_res) {}

    friend info operator + (info l, info r) {
        info res;
        if (l.sum == INV_INF)
            return r;
        if (r.sum == INV_INF)
            return l;
        res.pref = std::max(l.pref, l.sum + r.pref);
        res.suff = std::max(r.suff, r.sum + l.suff);
        res.sum = l.sum + r.sum;
        res.res = std::max({l.res, r.res, l.suff + r.pref});
        return res;
    }
};

auto code() -> void {
    int n, m;
    std::cin >> n >> m;

    std::vector<info> a(n + 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
        std::cin >> a[i].sum;
        a[i].pref = a[i].suff = a[i].res = a[i].sum;
    }

    segment_tree<info> seg(a);
    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++) {
        int op, x, y;
        std::cin >> op >> x >> y;
        if (op == 1) {
            if (x > y) std::swap(x, y);
            std::cout << seg.query(1, 1, n, x, y).res << '\n';
        } else {
            seg.update(1, 1, n, x, info(y, y, y, y));
        }
    }
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);

    // for (int i = 1, n = (std::cin >> n, n); i <= n; ++i)
        code();

    return 0;
}

docs.title: Luogu P5490 -【模板】扫描线 & 矩形面积并
Tag: 线段树，扫描线，离散化
题意
docs.text: 给你 $n$ 个二维平面上的矩形，问你这 $n$ 个矩形面积的并集是多少

docs.title: 思路
docs.text: 考虑将问题拆解为矩形面积相加，将操作维护成直线扫描即可

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

std::vector<int> all = {-1};

struct info {
    int len, tag;
    info()
    : len(0), tag(0) {}
    info(int _len, int _tag)
    : len(_len), tag(_tag) {}
};

template <typename Info> struct segment_tree {
public:
    #define lson (p << 1)
    #define rson (p << 1 | 1)
    segment_tree(int _n)
    : n(_n), f(4 << std::__lg(_n)) {}
    auto push_up(int p, int l, int r) -> void {
        if (f[p].tag)
            f[p].len = all[r + 1] - all[l];
        else if (l != r)
            f[p].len = f[lson].len + f[rson].len;
        else
            f[p].len = 0;
    }
    auto update(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, int x) -> void {
        if (R <= all[l] || all[r + 1] <= L) return;
        if (L <= all[l] && all[r + 1] <= R) return (void)(f[p].tag += x, push_up(p, l, r));
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        update(lson, l, m, L, R, x);
        update(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, x);
        push_up(p, l, r);
    }
    auto query(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R) -> int {
        if (R <= all[l] || all[r + 1] <= L) return 0;
        if (L <= all[l] && all[r + 1] <= R) return f[p].len;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        return query(lson, l, m, L, R) + query(rson, m + 1, r, L, R);
    }
    #undef lson
    #undef rson
private:
    int n;
    std::vector<Info> f;
};

auto code() -> void {
    int n;
    std::cin >> n;

    std::vector<std::array<int, 4>> query;
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
        int x1, x2, y1, y2;
        std::cin >> x1 >> y1 >> x2 >> y2;
        all.push_back(y1);
        all.push_back(y2);
        query.push_back({x1, y1, y2, 1});
        query.push_back({x2, y1, y2, -1});
    }

    std::sort(all.begin(), all.end());
    all.erase(std::unique(all.begin(), all.end()), all.end());
    std::sort(query.begin(), query.end(), [](auto &l, auto &r) {
        return l[0] < r[0];
    });

    Int ans = 0, m = all.size() - 1;
    segment_tree<info> seg(m - 1);
    for (int i = 0; i < query.size() - 1; i++) {
        auto [x, y1, y2, tag] = query[i];
        seg.update(1, 1, m - 1, y1, y2, tag);
        ans += 1LL * (query[i + 1][0] - x) * seg.query(1, 1, m - 1, all[1], all[m]);
    }

    std::cout << ans << '\n';
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);

    // for (int i = 1, n = (std::cin >> n, n); i <= n; ++i)
        code();

    return 0;
}

docs.title: Luogu P7783 - 平面最近点对（加强版）
题意
docs.text: 查找二维平面上的 $n$ 个点之间的最小距离

docs.title: 思路
docs.text:
考虑分治，每次将当前 $x$ 的中位数作为分界线，由于我的左部分最小 $dis$ 和我的右部分最小 $dis$ 是可以确定的，那么如果中间部分有更优的 $dis$ 的话则需要枚举

由于我令 $x$ 的中位数作为了分界线，那么也就有，$x - x_{mid} \le min(dis_l, dis_r)$ 的点才符合我去枚举的条件

然后再顺序枚举一下即可

总复杂度 $O(nlogn)$

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

#define P(X, Y) ((X - Y) * (X - Y))
#define D(X, Y) (P(X.x, Y.x) + P(X.y, Y.y))

constexpr Int INF = 4e18;

struct pos {
    Int x, y;
};

auto code() -> void {
    int n;
    std::cin >> n;

    std::vector<pos> p(n + 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
        std::cin >> p[i].x >> p[i].y;
    std::sort(p.begin() + 1, p.end(), [](pos &l, pos &r) {
        return l.x < r.x;
    });

    auto merge = [&](int l, int m, int r) -> void {
        static std::vector<pos> tmp(n + 1);
        int idx = l, L = l, R = m + 1;
        while (L <= m && R <= r) {
            if (p[L].y < p[R].y)
                tmp[idx++] = p[L++];
            else
                tmp[idx++] = p[R++];
        }
        while (L <= m) tmp[idx++] = p[L++];
        while (R <= r) tmp[idx++] = p[R++];
        for (int i = l; i <= r; i++) p[i] = tmp[i];
    };

    auto dfs = [&](auto &&self, int l, int r) -> Int {
        if (l == r) return INF;
        if (l + 1 == r) {
            if (p[l].y > p[r].y)
                std::swap(p[l], p[r]);
            return D(p[l], p[r]);
        }

        int m = l + r >> 1;
        Int mid = p[m].x;
        Int dis = std::min(self(self, l, m), self(self, m + 1, r));
        merge(l, m, r);

        std::vector<pos> tmp;
        for (int i = l; i <= r; i++) {
            if (P(p[i].x, mid) < dis) tmp.push_back(p[i]);
        }

        for (int i = 0; i < tmp.size(); i++) {
            for (int j = i + 1; j < tmp.size() && P(tmp[i].y, tmp[j].y) < dis; j++) {
                dis = std::min(dis, D(tmp[i], tmp[j]));
            }
        }

        return dis;
    };

    std::cout << dfs(dfs, 1, n) << '\n';
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);

    // for (int i = 1, n = (std::cin >> n, n); i <= n; ++i)
        code();

    return 0;
}

docs.title: Luogu P1314 - [NOIP2011 提高组] 聪明的质监员
题意
docs.text: 根据题目所示公式，求出 $|S - sum|$ 的最小值

docs.title: 思路
docs.text: 观察 $W$ 递增的时候，$sum$ 一定是递减的，很符合单调性直觉，之间二分查找即可，过程中记录答案

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

auto code() -> void {
    Int n, m, s;
    std::cin >> n >> m >> s;

    std::vector<std::array<Int, 2>> info(n + 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
        std::cin >> info[i][0] >> info[i][1];

    std::vector<std::array<Int, 2>> query(m + 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++)
        std::cin >> query[i][0] >> query[i][1];

    Int res = 1e18;
    auto check = [&](Int x) -> bool {
        std::vector<Int> pref_a(n + 1), pref_b(n + 1);
        for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
            if (info[i][0] >= x) {
                pref_a[i] = 1;
                pref_b[i] = info[i][1];
            }
            pref_a[i] += pref_a[i - 1];
            pref_b[i] += pref_b[i - 1];
        }

        Int sum = 0;
        for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++) {
            auto [L, R] = query[i];
            sum += (pref_a[R] - pref_a[L - 1]) * (pref_b[R] - pref_b[L - 1]);
        }

        res = std::min(res, abs(s - sum));

        return sum <= s;
    };

    Int l = 1, r = 1e6;
    while (l + 1 < r) {
        Int mid = l + r >> 1;
        if (check(mid))
            r = mid;
        else
            l = mid;
    }

    check(l);
    check(r);
    std::cout << res << '\n';
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);

    // for (int i = 1, n = (std::cin >> n, n); i <= n; ++i)
        code();

    return 0;
}

docs.title: 题意
docs.text: 最小化经过路径上的最大权值

docs.title: 思路
docs.text: 二分 + BFS即可

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

constexpr int dx[4] = {1, -1, 0, 0};
constexpr int dy[4] = {0, 0, 1, -1};

auto code() -> void {
    Int n, m;
    std::cin >> n >> m;

    std::vector mp(n + 1, std::vector<Int>(m + 1));
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
        for (int j = 1; j <= m; j++)
            std::cin >> mp[i][j];

    auto check = [&](Int lim) -> bool {
        std::queue<std::pair<int, int>> q;
        std::vector vis(n + 1, std::vector<int>(m + 1));

        for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++) {
            q.push({1, i});
            vis[1][i] = 1;
        }

        while (!q.empty()) {
            auto [x, y] = q.front(); q.pop();

            auto check = [&](int x, int y) -> bool {
                return 1 <= x && x <= n && 1 <= y && y <= n && !vis[x][y] && mp[x][y] <= lim;
            };

            for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
                int nx = x + dx[i];
                int ny = y + dy[i];
                if (check(nx, ny)) {
                    vis[nx][ny] = 1;
                    q.push({nx, ny});
                }
            }
        }

        return vis[n][m];
    };

    Int l = 0, r = 1000;
    while (l + 1 < r) {
        Int mid = l + r >> 1;
        if (check(mid))
            r = mid;
        else
            l = mid;
    }

    if (check(l))
        std::cout << l << '\n';
    else
        std::cout << r << '\n';
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);

    // for (int i = 1, n = (std::cin >> n, n); i <= n; ++i)
        code();

    return 0;
}

docs.title: 题意
docs.text: 问你一个区间 $[L, R]$ 使得均满足题目条件的这个区间 $L$ 和 $R$ 是多少

docs.title: 思路
docs.text: 二分这个区间即可

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

auto code() -> void {
    int n, k;
    std::cin >> n >> k;

    std::vector<Int> opt(n + 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
        std::cin >> opt[i];

    bool flag = false;

    auto check = [&](Int x) -> Int {
        Int now = 0, cnt = 0;
        for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
            now += opt[i];
            if (now < 0)
                now = 0;
            if (now >= x)
                now = 0, cnt++;
        }
        return cnt;
    };

    Int l = 1, r = 1e12;
    while (l + 1 < r) {
        Int m = l + r >> 1;
        if (check(m) <= k)
            r = m;
        else
            l = m;
    }

    if (check(l) == k) {
        std::cout << l << ' ';
    } else if (check(r) == k) {
        std::cout << r << ' ';
    } else {
        std::cout << -1 << '\n';
        return;
    }

    l = 1, r = 1e12;
    while (l + 1 < r) {
        Int m = l + r >> 1;
        if (check(m) >= k)
            l = m;
        else
            r = m;
    }

docs.title: 题意
docs.text: 维护一个数，每次乘上一个数或除上一个数，并输出它当前的值

docs.title: 思路
docs.text: 离散化后线段树维护即可

docs.title: 法1
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

template <typename T>
constexpr auto quick_power(T a, uInt b, T res = T(1)) -> T {
    for (; b; a *= a, b >>= 1) if (b & 1) res *= a; return res;
}

template <Int P> struct mod_int {
    static Int M;
    constexpr static Int get_mod() {
        return P ? P : M;
    }
    constexpr static void set_mod(Int _M) {
        M = _M;
    }
    constexpr mod_int(Int _x = 0)
    : x(check(_x % get_mod())) {}
    constexpr Int check(Int val) const {
        if (val < 0)
            val += get_mod();
        if (val >= get_mod())
            val -= get_mod();
        return val;
    }
    constexpr mod_int inv() const {
        return quick_power(*this, get_mod() - 2);
    }
    constexpr mod_int operator - () const {
        return mod_int(check(get_mod() - *this));
    }
    constexpr mod_int &operator += (mod_int other) & { this->x = check(this->x + other.x); return *this; }
    constexpr mod_int &operator -= (mod_int other) & { this->x = check(this->x - other.x); return *this; }
    constexpr mod_int &operator *= (mod_int other) & { this->x = check(this->x * other.x % get_mod()); return *this; }
    constexpr mod_int &operator /= (mod_int other) & { this->x = check(this->x * other.inv() % get_mod()); return *this; }
    friend constexpr mod_int operator + (mod_int l, mod_int r) { return l += r; }
    friend constexpr mod_int operator - (mod_int l, mod_int r) { return l -= r; }
    friend constexpr mod_int operator * (mod_int l, mod_int r) { return l *= r; }
    friend constexpr mod_int operator / (mod_int l, mod_int r) { return l /= r; }
    friend constexpr bool operator == (mod_int l, mod_int r) { return l.x == r.x; }
    friend constexpr bool operator != (mod_int l, mod_int r) { return l.x != r.x; }
    friend constexpr std::istream &operator >> (std::istream &is, mod_int &val) {
        return is >> val.x, val = mod_int(val.x), is;
    }
    friend constexpr std::ostream &operator << (std::ostream &os, const mod_int &val) {
        return os << val.x;
    }
private:
    Int x;
};

template <typename Info> struct segment_tree {
public:
    #define lson (p << 1)
    #define rson (p << 1 | 1)
    segment_tree(int _n)
    : n(_n), f(4 << std::__lg(_n)) {}
    segment_tree(std::vector<Info> info)
    : segment_tree(info.size() - 1) {
        auto build = [&](auto &&self, int p, int l, int r) -> void {
            if (l == r) return (void)(f[p] = info[l]);
            int m = l + r >> 1;
            self(self, lson, l, m);
            self(self, rson, m + 1, r);
            push_up(p);
        };
        build(build, 1, 1, n);
    }
    auto push_up(int p) -> void {
        f[p] = f[lson] + f[rson];
    }
    auto update(int p, int l, int r, int u, Info x) -> void {
        if (u < l || r < u) return;
        if (l == r) return (void)(f[p] = x);
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        update(lson, l, m, u, x);
        update(rson, m + 1, r, u, x);
        push_up(p);
    }
    auto query(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R) -> Info {
        if (R <  l || r <  L) return Info();
        if (L <= l && r <= R) return f[p];
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        return query(lson, l, m, L, R) + query(rson, m + 1, r, L, R);
    }
    auto find_first(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, auto &check) -> int {
        if (R < l || r > L || !check(f[p])) return -1;
        if (l == r) return l;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        int res = find_first(lson, l, m, L, R, check);
        if (res == -1)
            return find_first(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, check);
        else
            return res;
    }
    auto find_last(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, auto &check) -> int {
        if (R < l || r > L || !check(f[p])) return -1;
        if (l == r) return l;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        int res = find_last(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, check);
        if (res == -1)
            return find_last(lson, l, m, L, R, check);
        else
            return res;
    }
    #undef lson
    #undef rson
private:
    int n;
    std::vector<Info> f;
};

using mInt = mod_int<0>;
template <>
Int mInt::M = 114514;

struct info {
    mInt val;
    info() : val(mInt(1)) {}
    info(mInt _val) : val(_val) {}
    friend info operator + (info l, info r) {
        return info(l.val * r.val);
    }
};

auto code() -> void {
    int q;
    std::cin >> q >> mInt::M;

    std::vector<int> all = {-1};
    std::vector<std::array<int, 2>> query(q + 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= q; i++) {
        std::cin >> query[i][0] >> query[i][1];
        if (query[i][0] == 1)
            all.push_back(query[i][1]);
        else
            query[i][1] = query[query[i][1]][1];
    }

    std::sort(all.begin(), all.end());
    all.erase(std::unique(all.begin(), all.end()), all.end());

    auto rank = [&all](int x) -> int {
        return std::lower_bound(all.begin(), all.end(), x) - all.begin();
    };

    int n = all.size() - 1;
    std::map<int, int> cnt;
    segment_tree<info> seg(n);

    for (int i = 1; i <= q; i++) {
        auto [op, x] = query[i];

        if (op == 1)
            seg.update(1, 1, n, rank(x), info(quick_power(mInt(x), ++cnt[x])));
        else
            seg.update(1, 1, n, rank(x), info(quick_power(mInt(x), --cnt[x])));

        std::cout << seg.query(1, 1, n, 1, n).val << '\n';
    }
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);

    for (int i = 1, n = (std::cin >> n, n); i <= n; ++i)
        code();

    return 0;
}

docs.title: Luogu P1010 - [NOIP1998 普及组] 幂次方
题意
docs.text: 将所给的数 $n$ 依据题目条件进行分解

docs.title: 思路
docs.text: 递归跑一遍即可

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

auto code() -> void {
    int n;
    std::cin >> n;

    std::string ans;
    auto solve = [&](auto &&self, int x) -> void {
        for (int i = std::__lg(x); i >= 0; i--) {
            if (x >> i & 1) {
                if (i == 0) {
                    ans += "2(0)";
                } else if (i == 1) {
                    ans += "2";
                } else {
                    ans += "2(";
                    self(self, i);
                    ans += ")";
                }
                x ^= 1 << i;
                if (x != 0)
                    ans += "+";
            }
        }
    };

    solve(solve, n);
    std::cout << ans << '\n';
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {

}

docs.title: Luogu P1257 - 平面上的最接近点对
题意
docs.text: 查找二维平面上的 $n$ 个点之间的最小距离

docs.title: 思路
docs.text: 暴力枚举

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

#define D(X, Y) ((X.x - Y.x) * (X.x - Y.x) + (X.y - Y.y) * (X.y - Y.y))

constexpr Int INF = 3e18;

struct pos {
    Int x, y;

    pos()
    : x(0), y(0) {}
    pos(Int _x, Int _y)
    : x(_x), y(_y) {}

    auto input() -> void {
        std::cin >> x >> y;
    }
};

auto code() -> void {
    int n;
    std::cin >> n;

    std::vector<pos> p(n + 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
        p[i].input();

    Int ans = INF;
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
        for (int j = i + 1; j <= n; j++) {
            ans = std::min(ans, D(p[i], p[j]));
        }
    }

    std::cout << sqrt((double)(ans)) << '\n';
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);
    std::cout << std::fixed << std::setprecision(4);

    // for (int i = 1, n = (std::cin >> n, n); i <= n; ++i)
        code();

    return 0;
}

docs.title: 思路
docs.text: 考虑往前递推即可

#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

auto code() -> void {
    std::string s;
    std::cin >> s;

    Int N;
    std::cin >> N;

    while (N > s.size()) {
        Int tmp = s.size();
        while ((tmp << 1) < N)
            tmp <<= 1;
        N -= tmp;
        if (N == 1)
            N = tmp;
        else
            N = N - 1;
    }

    std::cout << s[N - 1] << '\n';
}

题意
docs.text: 问你最早的不满足订单编号

docs.title: 思路
docs.text: 二分 + 差分模拟即可

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

auto code() -> void {
    int n, m;
    std::cin >> n >> m;

    std::vector<Int> a(n + 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
        std::cin >> a[i];

    std::vector<std::array<Int, 3>> opt(m + 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++)
        std::cin >> opt[i][0] >> opt[i][1] >> opt[i][2];

    auto check = [&](Int x) -> bool {
        std::vector<Int> d(n + 2);
        for (int i = 1; i <= x; i++) {
            d[opt[i][1]] += opt[i][0];
            d[opt[i][2] + 1] -= opt[i][0];
        }
        for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
            d[i] += d[i - 1];
            if (d[i] > a[i]) return true;
        }
        return false;
    };

    Int l = 1, r = m;
    while (l + 1 < r) {
        Int mid = l + r >> 1;
        if (check(mid))
            r = mid;
        else
            l = mid;
    }

    if (check(l)) {
        std::cout << -1 << '\n';
        std::cout << l << '\n';
    } else if (check(r)) {
        std::cout << -1 << '\n';
        std::cout << r << '\n';
    } else {
        std::cout << 0 << '\n';
    }
}
