docs.title: 题意
docs.text: 给你一个大小为 $n$ 的排列，共有 $m$ 次操作，每次操作可以将 $[L, R]$ 的数选择升序排序或降序排序，问最后位于 $x$ 的是哪个数

docs.title: 思路
docs.text:
首先考虑对一个 $01$ 序列排序的时间复杂度，只需要将区间分为两段，一段全置 $1$，一段全置 $0$ 即可，用线段树维护复杂度 $log(n)$

那么考虑二分答案，初始状态将 $<= x$ 的数全部设置为 $1$，将 $> x$ 的数全部设置为 $0$，模拟一遍即可

总复杂度 $O(mlognlogn)$

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

template <typename Info, typename Lazy> struct segment_tree {
public:
    #define lson (p << 1)
    #define rson (p << 1 | 1)
    segment_tree(int _n)
    : n(_n), f(4 << std::__lg(_n)), g(4 << std::__lg(_n)) {}
    segment_tree(std::vector<Info> info)
    : segment_tree(info.size() - 1) {
        auto build = [&](auto &&self, int p, int l, int r) -> void {
            if (l == r) return (void)(f[p] = info[l]);
            int m = l + r >> 1;
            self(self, lson, l, m);
            self(self, rson, m + 1, r);
            push_up(p);
        };
        build(build, 1, 1, n);
    }
    auto push_up(int p) -> void {
        f[p] = f[lson] + f[rson];
    }
    auto push_down(int p) -> void {
        f[lson] += g[p], g[lson] += g[p];
        f[rson] += g[p], g[rson] += g[p];
        g[p] = Lazy();
    }
    auto update(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, Lazy x) -> void {
        if (R <  l || r <  L) return;
        if (L <= l && r <= R) return (void)(f[p] += x, g[p] += x);
        push_down(p);
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        update(lson, l, m, L, R, x);
        update(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, x);
        push_up(p);
    }
    auto query(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R) -> Info {
        if (R <  l || r <  L) return Info();
        if (L <= l && r <= R) return f[p];
        push_down(p);
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        return query(lson, l, m, L, R) + query(rson, m + 1, r, L, R);
    }
    auto find_first(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, auto &check) -> int {
        if (R < l || r > L || !check(f[p])) return -1;
        if (l == r) return l;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        int res = find_first(lson, l, m, L, R, check);
        if (res == -1)
            return find_first(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, check);
        else
            return res;
    }
    auto find_last(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, auto &check) -> int {
        if (R < l || r > L || !check(f[p])) return -1;
        if (l == r) return l;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        int res = find_last(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, check);
        if (res == -1)
            return find_last(lson, l, m, L, R, check);
        else
            return res;
    }
    #undef lson
    #undef rson
private:
    int n;
    std::vector<Info> f;
    std::vector<Lazy> g;
};

struct lazy {
    int val;
    lazy()
    : val(-1) {}
    lazy(int _val)
    : val(_val) {}

    lazy &operator += (lazy tag) {
        if (tag.val == -1)
            return *this;
        else
            return val = tag.val, *this;
    }
};

struct info {
    int val, siz;
    info()
    : val(0), siz(0) {}
    info(int _val, int _siz)
    : val(_val), siz(_siz) {}

    info &operator += (lazy tag) {
        if (tag.val == -1)
            return *this;
        else
            return val = siz * tag.val, *this;
    }

    friend info operator + (info l, info r) {
        return info(l.val + r.val, l.siz + r.siz);
    }
};

auto code() -> void {
    int n, m;
    std::cin >> n >> m;

    std::vector<int> a(n + 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
        std::cin >> a[i];

    std::vector<std::array<int, 3>> opt(m + 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++)
        std::cin >> opt[i][0] >> opt[i][1] >> opt[i][2];

    int target;
    std::cin >> target;

    auto check = [&](int x) -> bool {
        std::vector<info> INFO(n + 1);
        for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
            INFO[i].val = a[i] >= x;
            INFO[i].siz = 1;
        }

        segment_tree<info, lazy> seg(INFO);
        for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++) {
            auto &[op, l, r] = opt[i];

            int val = seg.query(1, 1, n, l, r).val;

            if (op == 0) {
                seg.update(1, 1, n, l, r - val, 0);
                seg.update(1, 1, n, r - val + 1, r, 1);
            } else {
                seg.update(1, 1, n, l, l + val - 1, 1);
                seg.update(1, 1, n, l + val, r, 0);
            }
        }

        return seg.query(1, 1, n, target, target).val;
    };

    int l = 1, r = n;
    while (l + 1 < r) {
        int mid = l + r >> 1;
        if (check(mid))
            l = mid;
        else
            r = mid;
    }

    if (check(r))
        std::cout << r << '\n';
    else
        std::cout << l << '\n';
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);

    // for (int i = 1, n = (std::cin >> n, n); i <= n; ++i)
        code();

    return 0;
}

docs.title: 题意
docs.text: 给你一个大小为 $n$ 的排列，共询问 $m$ 个区间 $[L, R]$，如果存在 $L \le i < j \le R$，$L$ 和 $R$ 是最大值和次大值获得 $X$ 点贡献，如果只有一个是最大值，无次大值，获得 $Y$ 点贡献，问区间 $[L, R]$ 的贡献是多少

docs.title: 思路
docs.text:
考虑将贡献转化，转换成离线二维数点，将每个区间看作 $(l, r)$，那么一次查询 $[L, R]$ 则是查询 $(L, L)$ 到 $(R, R)$ 这个矩形内有多少个满足 $X$ 和 $Y$ 贡献的点

预处理前一个的最大值和后一个的最大值，分别为 $Prev$ 和 $Next$，那么有:

  • $(Prev_i, Next_i)$ 有贡献 $X$
  • $([Prev_i + 1, i - 1], Next_i)$ 有贡献 $Y$
  • $(Prev_i, [i + 1, Next_i - 1])$ 有贡献 $Y$

接下来二维数点板子即可

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

template <typename Info, typename Lazy> struct segment_tree {
public:
    #define lson (p << 1)
    #define rson (p << 1 | 1)
    segment_tree(int _n)
    : n(_n), f(4 << std::__lg(_n)), g(4 << std::__lg(_n)) {}
    segment_tree(std::vector<Info> info)
    : segment_tree(info.size() - 1) {
        auto build = [&](auto &&self, int p, int l, int r) -> void {
            if (l == r) return (void)(f[p] = info[l]);
            int m = l + r >> 1;
            self(self, lson, l, m);
            self(self, rson, m + 1, r);
            push_up(p);
        };
        build(build, 1, 1, n);
    }
    auto push_up(int p) -> void {
        f[p] = f[lson] + f[rson];
    }
    auto push_down(int p) -> void {
        f[lson] += g[p], g[lson] += g[p];
        f[rson] += g[p], g[rson] += g[p];
        g[p] = Lazy();
    }
    auto update(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, Lazy x) -> void {
        if (R <  l || r <  L) return;
        if (L <= l && r <= R) return (void)(f[p] += x, g[p] += x);
        push_down(p);
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        update(lson, l, m, L, R, x);
        update(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, x);
        push_up(p);
    }
    auto query(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R) -> Info {
        if (R <  l || r <  L) return Info();
        if (L <= l && r <= R) return f[p];
        push_down(p);
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        return query(lson, l, m, L, R) + query(rson, m + 1, r, L, R);
    }
    auto find_first(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, auto &check) -> int {
        if (R < l || r > L || !check(f[p])) return -1;
        if (l == r) return l;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        int res = find_first(lson, l, m, L, R, check);
        if (res == -1)
            return find_first(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, check);
        else
            return res;
    }
    auto find_last(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, auto &check) -> int {
        if (R < l || r > L || !check(f[p])) return -1;
        if (l == r) return l;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        int res = find_last(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, check);
        if (res == -1)
            return find_last(lson, l, m, L, R, check);
        else
            return res;
    }
    #undef lson
    #undef rson
private:
    int n;
    std::vector<Info> f;
    std::vector<Lazy> g;
};

auto get_prev(int n, std::vector<int> &a) -> std::vector<int> {
    static std::vector<int> prev, stk;
    prev.assign(n + 1, 0);
    stk.clear();

    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
        while (!stk.empty() && a[stk.back()] < a[i])
            stk.pop_back();
        if (!stk.empty())
            prev[i] = stk.back();
        stk.push_back(i);
    }

    return prev;
}

auto get_next(int n, std::vector<int> &a) -> std::vector<int> {
    static std::vector<int> next, stk;
    next.assign(n + 2, n + 1);
    stk.clear();

    for (int i = n; i >= 1; i--) {
        while (!stk.empty() && a[stk.back()] < a[i])
            stk.pop_back();
        if (!stk.empty())
            next[i] = stk.back();
        stk.push_back(i);
    }

    return next;
}

struct lazy {
    Int x, y;
    lazy()
    : x(0), y(0) {}
    lazy(Int _x, Int _y)
    : x(_x), y(_y) {}

    lazy &operator += (lazy tag) {
        x += tag.x;
        y += tag.y;
        return *this;
    }
};

struct info {
    Int x, y, siz;
    info()
    : x(0), y(0), siz(0) {}
    info(Int _x, Int _y, Int _siz)
    : x(_x), y(_y), siz(_siz) {}

    info &operator += (lazy tag) {
        x += tag.x * siz;
        y += tag.y * siz;
        return *this;
    }

    friend info operator + (info l, info r) {
        return info(l.x + r.x, l.y + r.y, l.siz + r.siz);
    }
};

auto code() -> void {
    int n, m, x, y;
    std::cin >> n >> m >> x >> y;

    std::vector<int> a(n + 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
        std::cin >> a[i];

    std::vector<int> prev = get_prev(n, a);
    std::vector<int> next = get_next(n, a);

    std::vector<std::array<int, 5>> opt;
    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++) {
        int l, r;
        std::cin >> l >> r;
        opt.push_back({l - 1, l, r, i, -1});
        opt.push_back({r, l, r, i,  1});
    }
    std::sort(opt.begin(), opt.end());

    std::vector<std::array<int, 4>> upd;
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
        if (1 <= prev[i] && next[i] <= n)
            upd.push_back({next[i], prev[i], prev[i], 1});
        if (1 <= prev[i] && next[i] - 1 > i)
            upd.push_back({prev[i], i + 1, next[i] - 1, 0});
        if (n >= next[i] && prev[i] + 1 < i)
            upd.push_back({next[i], prev[i] + 1, i - 1, 0});
    }
    std::sort(upd.begin(), upd.end());

    int idx = 0;
    std::vector<Int> res(m + 1);
    segment_tree<info, lazy> seg(std::vector<info>(n + 1, info(0, 0, 1)));
    for (auto &[now, l, r, id, tag] : opt) {
        while (idx < upd.size() && upd[idx][0] <= now) {
            auto [u, l, r, v] = upd[idx++];
            seg.update(1, 1, n, l, r, lazy(v, v ^ 1));
        }
        auto [a, b, c] = seg.query(1, 1, n, l, r);
        res[id] += (a * x + b * y) * tag;
        if (tag == 1) res[id] += (r - l) * x;
    }

    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++)
        std::cout << res[i] << '\n';
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);

    // for (int i = 1, n = (std::cin >> n, n); i <= n; ++i)
        code();

    return 0;
}

docs.title: 题意
docs.text: 给你一个大小为 $n$ 的序列，共有 $m$ 次操作，每次操作后查找从 $1$ 开始的最长的递增序列，其中忽略为 $0$ 的项

docs.title: 思路
docs.text:
考虑最长递增子序列是如何维护的，二分新加进来的数所能放置的位置

如果是两个递增序列合并呢？

设左递增序列为 $p_1, p_2, ..., p_x$，右递增序列为 $q_1, q_2, ..., q_y$

那么合并两序列需要找到 $p_x$ 在 $q_1, ..., q_y$ 中所能处的位置

而我线段树上，已经将 $q_1, .., q_y$ 的信息存储了，故而只需要在线段树上二分即可

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

template <typename Info, typename Node> struct segment_tree {
public:
    #define lson (p << 1)
    #define rson (p << 1 | 1)
    segment_tree(int _n)
    : n(_n), f(4 << std::__lg(_n)) {}
    segment_tree(std::vector<Info> info)
    : segment_tree(info.size() - 1) {
        auto build = [&](auto &&self, int p, int l, int r) -> void {
            if (l == r) return (void)(f[p] = info[l]);
            int m = l + r >> 1;
            self(self, lson, l, m);
            self(self, rson, m + 1, r);
            push_up(p, l, r);
        };
        build(build, 1, 1, n);
    }
    auto maintain(int p, int l, int r, Node pre) -> int {
        if (f[p].pos <= pre)
            return 0;
        if (l == r)
            return pre < f[p].pos;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        if (f[lson].pos <= pre)
            return maintain(rson, m + 1, r, pre);
        else
            return maintain(lson, l, m, pre) + f[p].val - f[lson].val;
    }
    auto push_up(int p, int l, int r) -> void {
        f[p].pos = std::max(f[lson].pos, f[rson].pos);
        f[p].val = f[lson].val + maintain(rson, (l + r >> 1) + 1, r, f[lson].pos);
    }
    auto update(int p, int l, int r, int u, Info x) -> void {
        if (u < l || r < u) return;
        if (l == r) return (void)(f[p] = x);
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        update(lson, l, m, u, x);
        update(rson, m + 1, r, u, x);
        push_up(p, l, r);
    }
    auto query(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R) -> int {
        if (R <  l || r <  L) return 0;
        if (L <= l && r <= R) return f[p].val;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        return query(lson, l, m, L, R) + query(rson, m + 1, r, L, R);
    }
    #undef lson
    #undef rson
private:
    int n;
    std::vector<Info> f;
};

struct node {
    int x, y;
    node()
    : x(0), y(0) {}
    node(int _x, int _y)
    : x(_x), y(_y) {}

    friend bool operator < (node l, node r) {
        return (Int)l.y * r.x <  (Int)r.y * l.x;
    }
    friend bool operator <= (node l, node r) {
        return (Int)l.y * r.x <= (Int)r.y * l.x;
    }
};

struct info {
    node pos;
    int  val;
    info()
    : pos(node()), val(0) {}
    info(node _pos, int _val)
    : pos(_pos), val(_val) {}
};

auto code() -> void {
    int n, m;
    std::cin >> n >> m;

    std::vector<info> init(n + 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
        init[i].pos.x = i;

    segment_tree<info, node> seg(init);
    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++) {
        node tmp;
        std::cin >> tmp.x >> tmp.y;
        seg.update(1, 1, n, tmp.x, info(tmp, 1));
        std::cout << seg.query(1, 1, n, 1, n) << '\n';
    }
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);

    // for (int i = 1, n = (std::cin >> n, n); i <= n; ++i)
        code();

    return 0;
}
